answer:
Spartan is woken by the police in 2032 to help stop Phoenix, who had escaped from the cryo-penitentiary. He is then assigned to Lieutenant Lenina Huxley to acclimate to the future. Thus, Spartan exits his frozen state by being deliberately thawed and released by the authorities. 

\boxed{\text{Spartan is deliberately thawed and released by the police in 2032.}}
